settings.title: Fashion that funds futures
settings.subtitle: Homeboy Threads is the retail arm of Homeboy Industries — the world's largest gang intervention and reentry program. Every purchase funds job training, mental health services, and second chances.
settings.embed_description: Learn more about the programs your purchase supports at Homeboy Industries.

settings.name: Reformation
settings.description: Sustainable fashion brand donating overstock and samples. Known for effortless dresses, tops, and denim.

settings.name: Guess
settings.description: Iconic American brand donating denim, essentials, and lifestyle pieces at scale.

settings.name: Madewell
settings.description: Premium denim and everyday essentials. Donating quality basics and statement pieces.

settings.name: Levi's
settings.description: Heritage denim brand contributing classic jeans, jackets, and wardrobe staples.

settings.name: Anthropologie
settings.description: Bohemian-inspired lifestyle brand donating unique dresses, home goods, and accessories.

settings.name: Banana Republic
settings.description: Modern workwear and polished essentials. Donating professional and casual pieces.
